description: Kapeli makes Dash, a macOS documentation browser and code snippet manager that provides offline API docs and generated docsets. Developers can integrate other apps with Dash to trigger searches in installed documentation sets.
summary: kapeli.com exposes a public Dash integration surface via custom URL schemes (`dash://` and `dash-plugin://`) for triggering local Dash searches; its site also mentions local MCP and HTTP API features in the Dash app, but does not publish connect endpoints, base URLs, or authentication details for them.
